description: Visual boards for planning, specifying, prioritizing, and shipping product features — from high-level roadmaps to granular user stories and release coordination.

templates.name: Feature Planning Board
templates.description: Comprehensive feature specification with user stories, wireframes, and technical requirements

templates.name: User Story Mapping
templates.description: Organize user activities, tasks, and stories into a prioritized delivery plan

templates.name: Product Roadmap
templates.description: Communicate product direction across Now/Next/Later or quarterly timelines

templates.name: Release Planning Board
templates.description: Coordinate everything needed to ship a release: features, QA, deployment, and communications

templates.name: Prioritization Matrix
templates.description: Evaluate and rank features by impact vs effort using visual matrix and RICE scoring
